nasb.text: For the devious are an abomination to the Lord; But He is intimate with the upright.

esv.text: for the devious person is an abomination to the Lord, but the upright are in his confidence.

cnv.text: 因為偏離正道的人，是耶和華所厭惡的， 正直人卻是他所親愛的。

ccb.text: 因为耶和华憎恶邪僻之徒， 喜爱正直的人。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华憎恶邪僻的人， 而与正直的人亲密无间。
